items.question: Which pattern fits 'longest sub-array with at most k distinct elements'?
items.explanation: Maintain a counter; expand `r`; shrink `l` while distinct > k.

items.question: Which pattern fits 'shortest path in an unweighted graph'?
items.explanation: Each edge counts 1; BFS gives shortest hop count in O(V + E).

items.question: Which pattern fits 'top 10 chunks by similarity score'?
items.explanation: O(n log k); avoids the cost of a full sort.

items.question: Which pattern fits 'execution order for tools with dependencies'?
items.explanation: Kahn's algorithm or DFS post-order on the dependency DAG.

items.question: Which pattern fits 'sub-array sum equals K' for an unsorted array of integers (positive or negative)?
items.explanation: Sliding window assumes non-negative; with negatives, store prefix sums and look up `prefix - K`.
